title: Lady Speed Stick Womens Invisible Dry Deodorant Antiperspirant (3 Scent Choices)
description:
Looking for a deodorant that will keep you feeling and smelling fresh all day and night? Then you need the Lady Speed Stick Shower Fresh Power Antiperspirant! This 1.4-ounce invisible dry stick provides up to 48 hours of odor protection, and will not leave a white residue on your clothing. It's designed with encapsulation technology that will provide a burst of freshness when you need it throughout the day, and will protect you from odor and wetness. The fresh Shower Fresh scent will combat underarm perspiration, giving you maximum confidence whether you're at work, traveling or going out with friends after a long day. This is a must-have deodorant for busy lifestyles!

Lady Speed Stick Womens Invisible Dry Deodorant Antiperspirant (3 Scent Choices)

Looking for a deodorant that will keep you feeling and smelling fresh all day and night? Then you need the Lady Speed Stick Shower Fresh Power Antiperspirant!

Key Features

  • TRUSTED LADY SPEED STICK BRAND - Invisible Dry Power Deodorant Wont Leave White Residue on Clothing
  • FRESH SCENT - Shower Fresh Scent Leverages Fragrance Encapsulation Technology to Provide Bursts of Freshness Throughout the Day
  • 48 HOUR PROTECTION - Unique Formula Designed to Protect Against Wetness and Odor for Up to 48 Hours
  • REDUCES UNDERARM PERSPIRATION - Gentle on Skin and Keeps You Dry All Day Long
  • CONVENIENT SIZE - 1.4 Ounce Speed Stick Easily Fits Inside Gym Bag, Purse or Backpack for On the Go Use

Product Specifications

  • MPN: LSSSBLDAP14
  • UPC: 855569004729
  • Size: Regular
